category_sources: source_facts.description says open-source GitLab command-line tool; official GitLab project README says GLab brings GitLab to the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official GitLab project README uses GLab as the product name; source_facts.name and executable are glab.
docs_sources: Official GitLab Docs has GitLab CLI (glab) documentation; official repository README includes usage and installation documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/cli, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies GitLab CLI; official GitLab docs mention issues, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, changelogs, releases, and GitLab agents for Kubernetes.
